title: Spectator Stick
description: A stick that hits a person and lifts them up, explodes and goes into spectator mode.
body:
**Spectator Stick**

*Commands*

*/spectatorstick*: Gives you a stick with which when you hit a person, it raises them up, makes an explosion animation and switches them to spectator mode.

Demonstration video

**IMPORTANT**
If you have any errors with the plugin, you can comment on the video and I will check it.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/wxG9_nd8HTA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
